name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new workflow

---

## Problem

What user workflow or production need does this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or existing approaches you considered.

## Output Impact

Does this change YAML schema, Fountain export, CLI flags, optional AI behavior, or documentation?

## Additional Context

Add examples, sample input/output, or related tools.
